meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: Denathrius has been draining its Light to wield against his foes. We will wield it against him, instead.
Go, mortals! I will hold her off!
Our target lies deep within the prison. Let none stand in your way.
Secure the prisoner and make a swift escape. Victory will be ours.
The large one must be the alpha. Slay it and the others will scatter.
The prisoner is down below. Z'rali, one of the naaru who invaded the Ember Ward. The others presumed it slain.
My forces command the skies above. We are in control!
quotes.transcript: My forces command the skies above. We are in control.

quotes.text: You walk in the domain of the Master, tread carefully.
quotes.transcript: You walk in the domain of the master. Tread carefully.

quotes.text: Orders are to be executed, not questioned.
quotes.transcript: Orders are to be executed, not questioned.

quotes.text: The rebellion is already dead! Some have not realized that yet.
quotes.transcript: The rebellion is already dead. Some have not realized that yet.

quotes.text: You lack the strength of stone.
quotes.transcript: You lack the strength of stone!

quotes.text: The depths will take you all!
quotes.transcript: The depths will take you all!

quotes.text: Enough! Your suffering will be a testament to the Master's wrath.
quotes.transcript: Enough! Your suffering will be a testament to the master's wrath!

quotes.text: No one escapes the Sanguine Depths. No one.
quotes.transcript: No one escapes the Sanguine Depths. No one.

quotes.text: Ha ha, you are tiny puny thing!
quotes.transcript: Ha ha, you are tiny puny thing!

quotes.text: None have ever escaped the Sanguine Depths, and neither will you!
quotes.transcript: None have ever escaped the Sanguine Depths, and neither will you!

quotes.text: Beat it! Or I beat you!
quotes.transcript: Beat it! Or I beat you!

quotes.text: These halls will be your tomb!
quotes.transcript: These halls will be your tomb!

quotes.text: I am me with biggest brain!
quotes.transcript: I am me with biggest brain!

quotes.text: The will of my mistress be done!
quotes.transcript: The will of my mistress be done!

quotes.text: Stoneborn! The fallen prince and his Moorwalker have come! Do not let them reach the master!
quotes.transcript: Stoneborn! The fallen prince and his Moorwalker have come! Do not let them reach the master!

quotes.text: I promise not to smash you yet. I promise good. But maybe time for me to break promise.
quotes.transcript: I promise not to smash you yet. I promise good. But maybe time for me to break promise.

quotes.text: That prisoner belongs to the master! You will not take it!
quotes.transcript: That prisoner belongs to the master! You will not take it!

quotes.text: You are nothing but Draven's dogs!
quotes.transcript: You are nothing but Draven's dogs!

quotes.text: Hehehe, yeah, or gonna get smushed!
quotes.transcript: Hehehe, yeah, or gonna get smushed!

quotes.text: I promise not to smash you yet. I promise good. But maybe time for me to break promise.
quotes.transcript: I promise not to smash you yet. I promise good. But maybe time for me to break promise.

quotes.text: I'm not so hungry now. You'll come back later.
quotes.transcript: I'm not so hungry now. You'll come back later.

quotes.text: Your mouth is beginning to look like a target.
quotes.transcript: Your mouth is beginning to look like a target.

quotes.text: Hehehe, yeah, or gonna get smushed!
quotes.transcript: Hehehe, yeah, or gonna get smushed!

quotes.text: Beat it! Or I beat you!
quotes.transcript: Beat it! Or I beat you!

quotes.text: STUBBIN' REVILS! YOU WILL MEET YOUR END!
quotes.transcript: STUBBIN' REVILS! YOU WILL MEET YOUR END!

quotes.text: So, this is the prize you seek. It will never leave this prison!
quotes.transcript: So, this is the prize you seek. It will never leave this prison!

quotes.text: Your treachery has come to an end!
quotes.transcript: Your treachery has come to an end!

quotes.text: Draven is not our threat. Their prince has fallen, and their rebellion is in shambles. Only the accuser remains to issue orders.
quotes.transcript: Draven is not our threat. Their prince has fallen, and their rebellion is in shambles. Only the accuser remains to issue orders.

quotes.text: Now you know why we need this Moorwalker alive.
quotes.transcript: Now you know why we need this Moorwalker alive.

quotes.text: Draven, do not make me destroy you!
quotes.transcript: Draven, do not make me destroy you!

quotes.text: You are a disgrace to our kind, Draven. If you will not serve, then you will fall!
quotes.transcript: You are a disgrace to our kind, Draven. If you will not serve, then you will fall!

quotes.text: AW folks, please continue to watch the other series of bother videos at the end of the week!
quotes.transcript: AW folks, please continue to watch the other series of bother videos at the end of the week!

quotes.text: Master take your parts. Make me stronger!
quotes.transcript: Master take your parts. Make me stronger!

quotes.text: Then truly in charge, not you!
quotes.transcript: Then truly in charge, not you!

quotes.text: Grisha, shield yourself! It is time to reign terror from above!
quotes.transcript: Grisha, shield yourself! It is time to reign terror from above!

quotes.text: We each have our orders. Your skills are needed elsewhere.
quotes.transcript: We each have our orders. Your skills are needed elsewhere.

quotes.text: You will confess, one way or another.
quotes.transcript: You will confess one way or another.

quotes.text: Others are in need of my ministrations.
quotes.transcript: Others are in need of my... ...ministrations.

quotes.text: I look forward to our time together!
quotes.transcript: I look forward to our time together!

quotes.text: Wrath is your most potent sin, Sunstrider. It will serve us well.
quotes.transcript: Wrath is your most potent sin, Sunstrider. It will serve us well.

quotes.text: Pity. I thought you wouldn't do her.
quotes.transcript: Pity. I thought you wouldn't do her.
